meilisearch: image: 'getmeili/meilisearch:latest' ports: - '${FORWARD_MEILISEARCH_PORT:-7700}:7700' environment: MEILI_NO_ANALYTICS: '${MEILISEARCH_NO_ANALYTICS:-false}' volumes: - 'sail-meilisearch:/meili_data' networks: - sail healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "wget", "--no-verbose", "--spider", "http://127.0.0.1:7700/health"] retries: 3 timeout: 5s
